empty: No API keys yet. Create one to allow programmatic access.

reveal.title: Copy your API key now
reveal.subtitle: This key is shown only once and cannot be retrieved again.

form.title: Create API key
form.description: API keys allow external services to authenticate as a specific user. Choose a descriptive name and the user whose permissions the key will inherit.
form.name: Key name
form.userIdHint: The numeric ID of the user this key will act as.

validation.userIdRequired: A valid numeric user ID is required

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API key?
revokeDialog.description: This permanently revokes "{{name}}". Any services using it will lose access immediately.
